## Project Identity

- **Name:** Jedi-Py-MCP
- **Path:** `Jedi-Py-MCP`
- **Repo class:** public
- **Repo class signals:** Public GitHub remote, live CI badge in `README.md`, MIT-licensed Python package metadata in `pyproject.toml`, console script entrypoint in `[project.scripts]`
- **Tech stack:** Python 3.14+, FastMCP, Pyright LSP, Jedi, rope, LibCST, Pydantic v2
- **Ecosystem role:** Public stdio MCP server for Python analysis and refactoring
- **Integration brief:** none
- **Session-start overrides:** Standard template plus repo-required reads of `ai_docs/planning_index.md` and `.cursor/rules/operational-essentials.md`
- **MCP servers declared:** none
- **Sibling discovery:** none

## Known Gaps

- `ai_docs/domains/python-refactor/mcp-checklist.md` prompt examples are still incomplete for the full 87-tool surface (tracked by backlog id `mcp-checklist-prompts`).
- Tool-count references in `README.md`, `docs/tool-reference.md`, and `ai_docs/domains/python-refactor/reference.md` must stay synchronized with `server.py`.
- `change_signature` still drops Python 3 annotations during rope normalization; this is an upstream limitation tracked in backlog id `known-rope-annotations`.

## Findings from Last Audit

- Migrated `.ai-doc-audit.md` to schema 4 and rewrote it to the current standard layout.
- Created `ai_docs/planning_index.md` and added the in-repo planning-scope contract.
- Replaced the deprecated mirrored `CLAUDE.md` with the collapsed-pointer form.
- Rewrote `AGENTS.md` to the current template and added the matching next-step protocol.
- Added the missing planning scope tag to `ai_docs/backlog.md`.
- Updated `ai_docs/README.md` to include the planning router.
- Expanded `ai_docs/runtime.md` with runner, config, packaging, and CI facts.
- Corrected `ai_docs/references/testing.md` to use `scripts/test-integration.ps1`.
- Added the missing purpose comment to `ai_docs/prompts/deep-review-refactor.md`.
- Expanded `docs/setup.md` and `docs/README.md` to cover validation commands for human readers.

## Codebase Domains

| Domain | Source path | ai_docs/ coverage | Notes |

| rope backend | `src/python_refactor_mcp/backends/rope_backend.py` | `architecture.md` | Refactoring edit generation |
| Tool orchestration | `src/python_refactor_mcp/tools/` | `domains/python-refactor/reference.md` | 89 files under tools |
| Config / discovery | `src/python_refactor_mcp/config.py` | `runtime.md` | Interpreter and workspace detection |
| Shared models | `src/python_refactor_mcp/models.py` | `architecture.md` | Pydantic response models |
| Utilities | `src/python_refactor_mcp/util/` | `architecture.md` | LSP, diff, and helper utilities |

## Build/Test/Run Commands

| Action | Command |
|--------|---------|
| Build executable | `./scripts/build.ps1` |
| Build executable (one-file) | `./scripts/build.ps1 -OneFile` |
| Test (unit) | `python -m pytest tests/unit/ -v` |
| Test (integration) | `./scripts/test-integration.ps1` |
| Lint | `python -m ruff check .` |
| Type check (Pyright) | `python -m pyright .` |
| Type check (mypy) | `python -m mypy .` |
| Run | `python -m python_refactor_mcp <workspace_root>` |
| Package install | `python -m pip install .` |
| CI mirror | `just ci` |
